commands.repair_reason: - [P2] The remaining blocker is maintainer acceptance of the FeatureTailscale compatibility contract, not a narrow automated code repair.; Cleared: The diff adds a sandbox-side Tailscale download and env-delivered auth key path, but I found no concrete security or supply-chain regression beyond the explicit pinned Tailscale runtime dependency. (sha=b1fc9df5e26f909e914db9575242827144475ce0)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in userspace Tailscale support for Islo, records tailnet endpoints on local claims, adjusts pond peer transport fallback, and documents/tests the new behavior.

Reproducibility: not applicable. as a bug reproduction; this is a feature PR. The PR body provides redacted live Islo/Tailscale proof for the proposed behavior.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The remaining blocker is maintainer acceptance of the FeatureTailscale compatibility contract, not a narrow automated code repair.

target.title: feat(islo): add Tailscale plane to the islo provider
target.body:
## Summary

Islo is a delegated-run provider with no Crabbox-managed SSH lease, so an all-Islo pond could previously only use the **URL bridge** plane: members were reachable by per-port HTTPS share URLs but did not join the pond tailnet.

This PR adds an opt-in **Tailscale userspace tailnet plane** for the Islo provider, driven entirely from Crabbox's side through the existing Islo exec stream. No Islo service or SDK changes are required.

When an Islo lease is warmed with `--tailscale`, Crabbox:

1. downloads the pinned static Tailscale build into the sandbox;
2. starts `tailscaled` in `--tun=userspace-networking` mode so it does not rewrite sandbox routes and sever the Islo exec transport;
3. exposes local SOCKS5 and HTTP proxies on `localhost:1055` for userspace tailnet traffic;
4. runs `tailscale up` with the configured pond tags, optional `TS_CONTROL_URL` login server, and optional exit-node flags;
5. records the assigned tailnet IPv4 on the local lease claim, so `crabbox pond peers` reports that member on `transport: tailnet`.

Scope note: this is a userspace Tailscale join, not an OS-routed kernel TUN like managed VM providers use. `tailscale ping` works, `pond peers` reports live tailnet membership, and sandbox processes can use the local userspace proxy for tailnet traffic. Unproxied process traffic keeps using the sandbox's normal network namespace. Islo leases warmed without `--tailscale` are unchanged and continue to resolve through the URL bridge.

## Changes

- `internal/providers/islo/provider.go`: advertise `FeatureTailscale` alongside `url-bridge` and `run-session`.
- `internal/providers/islo/tailscale.go`: add the exec-driven Tailscale bring-up, hostname/IP helpers, userspace SOCKS5+HTTP proxies, `TS_CONTROL_URL` forwarding, exit-node option forwarding, and bounded IP polling.
- `internal/providers/islo/backend.go`: join the tailnet after sandbox creation and roll back the sandbox + claim if the requested Tailscale plane fails.
- `internal/cli/claim.go` + `provider_exports.go`: let delegated providers record tailnet endpoints and labels on local claims.
- `internal/cli/pond_bridge.go`: for dual-plane providers, report `tailnet` only when a tailnet endpoint is recorded; otherwise fall back to URL bridge.
- Tests: Islo hostname/IP/script coverage, option-forwarding regression coverage, claim-label coverage, dual-plane `pond peers` coverage, and updated provider capability assertions.
- Docs: describe Islo's userspace tailnet contract and move release-note context out of `CHANGELOG.md`.

## Config / secrets

- `CRABBOX_TAILSCALE_AUTH_KEY`: existing node auth key env var for direct-provider `--tailscale` joins.
- `TS_CONTROL_URL`: existing self-hosted control-plane env var; forwarded as `--login-server` when set.
- `--tailscale-exit-node` and `--tailscale-exit-node-allow-lan-access`: passed through to `tailscale up`; for Islo, they apply to traffic sent through the userspace Tailscale path.
- `CRABBOX_ISLO_TAILSCALE_VERSION`: optional override for the pinned static Tailscale build, default `1.98.4`.

## Verification

Local:

```sh
go build -trimpath -o bin/crabbox ./cmd/crabbox
go vet ./...
go test ./internal/providers/islo/... ./internal/cli/
go test ./...
```

Live Islo/Tailscale smoke, run June 4, 2026. Secrets and private tailnet IPv4s are redacted.

```sh
$ bin/crabbox warmup --pond mesh-demo --slug node-a --provider islo --tailscale --tailscale-tags tag:cbx-pond-xyuoqa6-mesh-demo
islo: joining tailnet (hostname=crabbox-node-a tags=tag:cbx-pond-xyuoqa6-mesh-demo)
islo: joined tailnet ip=100.x.x.x
leased isb_crabbox-pr205-99edab slug=node-a provider=islo sandbox=crabbox-pr205-99edab
warmup complete total=50.249s

$ bin/crabbox warmup --pond mesh-demo --slug node-b --provider islo --tailscale --tailscale-tags tag:cbx-pond-xyuoqa6-mesh-demo
islo: joining tailnet (hostname=crabbox-node-b tags=tag:cbx-pond-xyuoqa6-mesh-demo)
islo: joined tailnet ip=100.x.x.x
leased isb_crabbox-pr205-1566fc slug=node-b provider=islo sandbox=crabbox-pr205-1566fc
warmup complete total=49.565s

$ bin/crabbox warmup --pond mesh-demo --slug node-c --provider islo --tailscale --tailscale-tags tag:cbx-pond-xyuoqa6-mesh-demo
islo: joining tailnet (hostname=crabbox-node-c tags=tag:cbx-pond-xyuoqa6-mesh-demo)
islo: joined tailnet ip=100.x.x.x
leased isb_crabbox-pr205-c0bc4c slug=node-c provider=islo sandbox=crabbox-pr205-c0bc4c
warmup complete total=49.913s

$ bin/crabbox pond peers --pond mesh-demo --json
{"members":[{"slug":"node-a","leaseID":"isb_crabbox-pr205-99edab","provider":"islo","pond":"mesh-demo","transport":"tailnet","transports":["tailnet","url"],"endpoint":"100.x.x.x","labels":{"tailscale":"true","tailscale_ipv4":"100.x.x.x","tailscale_state":"ready"}},{"slug":"node-b","leaseID":"isb_crabbox-pr205-1566fc","provider":"islo","pond":"mesh-demo","transport":"tailnet","transports":["tailnet","url"],"endpoint":"100.x.x.x","labels":{"tailscale":"true","tailscale_ipv4":"100.x.x.x","tailscale_state":"ready"}},{"slug":"node-c","leaseID":"isb_crabbox-pr205-c0bc4c","provider":"islo","pond":"mesh-demo","transport":"tailnet","transports":["tailnet","url"],"endpoint":"100.x.x.x","labels":{"tailscale":"true","tailscale_ipv4":"100.x.x.x","tailscale_state":"ready"}}]}

$ bin/crabbox run --provider islo --id node-a --no-sync -- /tmp/ts/tailscale --socket=/tmp/tsd.sock ping --until-direct=false --c 1 <node-b-100.x>
provider=islo lease=isb_crabbox-pr205-99edab sandbox=crabbox-pr205-99edab
pong from crabbox-node-b (100.x.x.x) via DERP(tor) in 16ms
islo run summary sync_skipped=true command=1.497s total=2.446s exit=0

$ bin/crabbox run --provider islo --id node-b --no-sync -- /tmp/ts/tailscale --socket=/tmp/tsd.sock ping --until-direct=false --c 1 <node-c-100.x>
provider=islo lease=isb_crabbox-pr205-1566fc sandbox=crabbox-pr205-1566fc
pong from crabbox-node-c (100.x.x.x) via DERP(tor) in 17ms
islo run summary sync_skipped=true command=1.449s total=2.260s exit=0

$ bin/crabbox run --provider islo --id node-c --no-sync -- bash -lc start-http-server-on-18081
provider=islo lease=isb_crabbox-pr205-c0bc4c sandbox=crabbox-pr205-c0bc4c
islo run summary sync_skipped=true command=431ms total=1.162s exit=0

$ bin/crabbox run --provider islo --id node-a --no-sync -- bash -lc 'http_proxy=http://localhost:1055 https_proxy=http://localhost:1055 wget -qO- --timeout=5 http://<node-c-100.x>:18081/proof.html'
provider=islo lease=isb_crabbox-pr205-99edab sandbox=crabbox-pr205-99edab
crabbox-tailnet-http-ok
islo run summary sync_skipped=true command=461ms total=1.172s exit=0
```
